brent_baseline_usd.source: scenario anchor — replaced by live BZ=F when backend present

pump_baseline_inr_l.source: IOCL Delhi retail petrol price band 2024-26

india_imports_bbl_d.source: PPAC monthly import data: India crude imports ~4.6-5.1 Mb/d

hormuz_import_share.source: EIA World Oil Transit Chokepoints + PPAC sourcing mix: ~2.1 of 4.7 Mb/d Indian imports transit Hormuz

hormuz_world_flow_bbl_d.source: EIA: ~17 Mb/d of crude+products transit Hormuz

world_supply_bbl_d.source: EIA STEO world liquids supply ~102 Mb/d

mitigation_hormuz.source: Saudi East-West (5 Mb/d) + ADNOC Fujairah (1.8 Mb/d) bypass pipelines ≈ 40% of Hormuz flow nameplate; ~30% usable short-notice (IEA/EIA closure analyses)

price_elasticity_pct_per_pct.source: short-run crude price response: 1% world supply loss ≈ +5-15% price (IMF/EIA episode studies incl. 1990, 2022)

overshoot_factor.source: panic premium over settled level in first ~2 weeks; 2022 analog: Brent 139 intraday vs ~117 settled

pass_through_inr_per_usd_bbl.source: PPAC retail price build-up: $1/bbl crude ≈ ₹0.5-0.6/L pre-policy at prevailing FX

policy_pass_through.source: CALIBRATED on the 2022 episode (administered prices): nets excise cuts + OMC absorption + INR depreciation into one factor (RBI Bulletin 2022). Council C1: an explicit FX channel would double-count this; splitting them = roadmap.

gdp_pp_per_10usd.source: RBI estimates: sustained +$10/bbl ≈ −0.15 to −0.4 pp India GDP growth

vulnerable_power_share.source: CEA generation mix: gas ~6% + oil ~0.5% + imported-coal-dependent ~8%

spr_days_cover.source: ISPRL strategic reserve ≈ 9.5 days of import cover (+ working-stock flexibility)

draw_cap_share.source: assumption: logistics cap — stock draw can cover at most ~70% of a daily supply gap

demand_elasticity.source: short-run fuel demand price elasticity ≈ −0.05 (IMF cross-country)

freight_per_added_day.source: assumption: charter time + war-risk premium per added voyage day, scaled into pass-through

scarcity_inr_per_run_loss.source: assumption: domestic scarcity premium per unit refinery run loss (price channel when world crude unmoved)

gdp_pp_per_run_loss.source: assumption: activity drag per unit run loss (fuel rationing chokes transport/industry)

redsea_import_share.source: Russian Urals ≈ 35-40% of India crude imports, routed via Suez/Red Sea

redsea_shortfall_factor.source: assumption: Cape reroute converts most Red Sea disruption into delay/cost; ~20% transient shortfall during the transition window

opec_max_cut_bbl_d.source: OPEC+ emergency cuts: 2020 ≈ 9.7 Mb/d, typical emergency rounds 2-4 Mb/d; σ=1 ≈ 4 Mb/d

freight_usd_per_bbl_day.source: Cape-detour economics: +$3-6/bbl landed cost over ~26 added days (tanker market reports 2024) ≈ $0.15-0.25/bbl/day
